SA_TYPE
Indicates to which survey the beneﬁciary responded (MA-PD, MA-Only, PDP, or FFS)
Note that SA_TYPE = 1 indicates MA-Only and SA_TYPE = 2 indicates MA-PD
These values are reversed for SU_TYPE
SA_PFFS
PFFS plan type indicator
SA_MMP
MMP plan type indicator
SA_ST_ABBR
FIPS State Name Abbreviations, derived from SA_FIPS_STATE
INDIV_WT
Post-stratiﬁcation weight for comparing patient subgroups and for national point
